\tzpentry{ID5278}{Delta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5278 introduces Delta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\lim_{p\to\text{TZP}} R_{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}(p) = \delta(p - \text{TZP})K_{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}\)
\]
